boolean.name: enableSiteManagementForProject
boolean.title: Enable site management for project
boolean.help: This feature enables site management for projects, a site representing a physical location whether it is an administrative building, a customer building, a construction site, etc.

many-to-many.name: defaultSitesSet
many-to-many.title: Default sites
many-to-many.help: Allows defining a default site that will be linked to projects.
